name: Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Combine all ingredients, mix well.
3. Press mixture firmly into bottom and 1-inch up the side of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and chill.
Filling:
1. Increase oven temperature to 425°F (220°C).
2. Beat cream cheese, 3/4 cup sugar and eggs on medium speed until creamy.
3. In a small bowl, beat 1/4 cup (50 mL) sugar, cocoa, melted shortening, vanilla and 1-1/2 cups of the cheese mixture until smooth.
4. Add jam and flour to remaining cheese mixture. Spread half of raspberry mixture in crust. Dollop half of chocolate mixture on top. Repeat with remaining two mixtures. Swirl gently with knife to marble effect.
5. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 250°F (120°C) and bake 45 to 55 minutes, or just until set.
6. Remove from oven and run a knife around the edge to loosen from the pan. Cool completely. Remove rim. Serve with Raspberry sauce.
Sauce: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan. Heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Cool, pressing through a sieve to remove seeds.
